docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTLOCK, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT CAVA, STEVEN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-07-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-06-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-17-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTLOCK, GERALD

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OR UNINSURED MOTORIST APPLICATION. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DIRECTED TO PLT.'S ATTY. HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-13-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THERE HAS BEEN NO JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO FILED. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-28-1997 CONTINUED FROM AUG-13-1997 TO JAN-28-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-28-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THIS CASE HAS NOT BEEN DESIGNATED AS UM AND WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN. HEARING SET FOR APR-01-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-01-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-01-1998, TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. WHY CASE HAS NOT BEEN DISIGNATED AS UM CASE OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY THOAMS B GILL STATUS STATEMENT TO BE FILE 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-16-1998 CONTINUED FROM APR-01-1998 TO MAY-13-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-13-1998, OFF CALENDAR CASE DISMISSED 5-11-98.
